channel.title: Motherduck on Lough on Data
channel.description: Recent content in Motherduck on Lough on Data

item.title: Building a Dream-Job Radar
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: On a dog-walk conversation with Claude that surfaced a role I would have otherwise missed — and the small dlt → S3 → MotherDuck pipeline I’m building so it doesn’t happen again.

item.title: Databox
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A single-operator data platform that ingests eBird, NOAA, and USGS into one queryable warehouse — built to answer whether species distributions shift with same-day weather and streamflow anomalies.
